overall.description: A static cinematic view of the Great Hall from a Harry Potter video game, depicting students in robes dining at long wooden tables beneath thousands of floating candles. The Gothic stone interior features towering arched windows, ornate chandeliers, and a warm magical atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gothic great hall with floating candle chandeliers

agents.ego_description: standing still in the center aisle observing the dining hall and students

notable_agents.action: students in dark robes sitting at the long table eating and conversing
students in dark robes sitting at the long table eating and conversing

entered.detail: thousands of floating candles suspended in mid-air providing warm illumination throughout the hall
red and gold house banner with lion crest hanging on the nearest table
long wooden banquet tables lined with plates, goblets, and food
tall stone columns supporting the vaulted ceiling
tall Gothic arched windows with stone tracery allowing natural light

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady view of the Great Hall, a vast Gothic dining chamber with floating candle chandeliers illuminating long wooden tables filled with students. The stone architecture features towering pillars and arched windows, while the Gryffindor house banner hangs prominently on the nearest table. Students in robes sit eating and conversing along both sides of the aisle.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze across the vast Gothic interior of the Great Hall, capturing the magical atmosphere of a student feast. It begins with a wide view of the chamber, where thousands of floating candles cast a warm glow over long wooden tables. As the camera lingers, the focus emphasizes the towering stone pillars and arched windows that define the architecture. The scene then settles on the students in robes conversing along the aisle, with the Gryffindor house banner hanging prominently over the nearest table.
